default_strike.text:
Weapon: gun.
Strike: 1R damage, with 1 optional maneuver each combat. This maneuver cannot be used during the first round. Once each round, if the bearer strikes with this gun, they get 1 optional additional strike (limited) this round, only usable to strike with this gun.
